title: Empires of the Americas Before Columbus

map.alt: Blank outline map of North and South America

items.label: Mississippian Culture
items.hint: Centered on Cahokia, near modern St. Louis, its largest mound rivaled Egypt's pyramids in footprint.

items.label: Aztec Empire
items.hint: Ruled from Tenochtitlan, an island city built in a lake in the Valley of Mexico.

items.label: Maya Civilization
items.hint: A network of city-states across the Yucatan Peninsula, known for astronomy and writing.

items.label: Inca Empire
items.hint: The largest empire in pre-Columbian America, ruled from Cusco high in the Andes.
